title: Replace imperative if/where with dynamic-reduce search
prompt: `MyApp.Accounts.Search.search/1` in `test_fixtures/chained_if_search.ex` uses `if/where` chaining for 4 optional filters. Rewrite it using `Enum.reduce(params, dynamic(true), fn ... end)` with one `dynamic/2` fragment per filter, then apply the accumulated dynamic to a single `where: ^dyn` clause. Handle string keys `"name"`, `"email"`, `"min_age"`, `"active"`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires the whole dynamic-reduce idiom (identity element, acc pinning, case-matching on keys). Canonical pattern but not one Sonnet reaches for by default.
research_citation: Ecto hexdocs dynamic-queries: 'By using dynamic fragments, you can decouple the processing of parameters from the query generation'
